metadata.title: OCCP — OpenCloud Control Plane | Agent Governance Platform
metadata.description: OCCP is the Verified Autonomy Pipeline for AI agents. Every autonomous action verified before execution. Policy-enforced, audit-logged, enterprise-ready governance for LLM-powered systems.
metadata.ogTitle: OCCP — OpenCloud Control Plane | Agent Governance Platform
metadata.ogDescription: Every autonomous action verified before execution. Policy-enforced, audit-logged, enterprise-ready. The control plane that governs AI agents.
metadata.twitterDescription: Every autonomous action verified before execution. Policy-enforced, audit-logged, enterprise-ready.

hero.badge: v1.0 · Open Source · SOC2 Type II · EU AI Act Art. 14
hero.subtitle: Every autonomous action verified, logged, and reversible — before it runs. The open-source Agent Control Plane with a 5-gate Verified Autonomy Pipeline. Policy-enforced. Tamper-evident. Self-hosted or managed.
hero.builtOnList: OpenAI · Anthropic · MCP · OpenTelemetry · FastAPI · Postgres

pipeline.ariaLabel: Verified Autonomy Pipeline: Plan, Gate, Execute, Validate, Ship
